title: Inventory and classify .ai/scripts
description: List each current script, identify its validation behavior, and classify whether it should remain as workflow glue or move to dotnet-native validation.
validation: Listed each current .ai/scripts top-level file and classified its transition target.
Grouped .ai/scripts/generated as generated regex checks to retire after replacement coverage exists.
Separated AI workflow/context governance scripts from C# semantic validation scripts.
